overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a grassy field at night in a video game, using a flashlight to illuminate a dirt path. The player moves steadily forward through open terrain before reaching a stone wall that runs alongside the path, creating an atmospheric exploration scene.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt path through tall grass, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight beam

entered.detail: narrow winding dirt trail cutting through tall grass, illuminated by flashlight
tall green grass flanking the left side of the path
tall green grass flanking the right side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees against the night sky on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through an open grassland at night. The flashlight illuminates a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall grass on both sides, with a distant tree line visible against the dark sky. The movement is steady and exploratory, with no other entities present in the empty field.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed trail with stone wall and dense vegetation

events.description: stone wall enters view on the left side of the path, creating a more enclosed corridor-like space

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with the stone wall now running parallel on the left, navigating through denser vegetation

entered.detail: weathered stone wall running parallel to the path, partially covered in vegetation
dense bushes growing alongside the stone wall

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, a weathered stone wall appears on the left, creating a more enclosed feeling along the trail. The open grassland gives way to denser vegetation with bushes growing alongside the wall. The flashlight continues to illuminate the path ahead as the environment transitions from open field to a corridor-like space bounded by the stone structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dark grassland that gradually transforms into a narrow, enclosed corridor. It begins with a steady walk across an open field, where a flashlight carves a path through tall grass toward a distant, dark tree line. As the movement continues, the expansive terrain shifts as a weathered stone wall emerges on the left, tightening the space around the trail. The scene then transitions from the open meadow into a more confined environment, with dense bushes growing along the stone structure. Finally, the flashlight guides the camera forward through this bounded passage, leaving the emptiness of the field behind.
